steps.title: Relate the legs with tangent
steps.content:
Angle $Y$ is a right angle, so $XY$ and $YZ$ are the legs. From angle $Z$, side $XY$ is opposite and $YZ=24$ is adjacent.
$$\tan 41^{\circ}=\frac{XY}{24}$$
$$XY=24\tan 41^{\circ}$$

steps.title: Write the triangle area
steps.content:
Use the right-triangle area formula with legs $XY$ and $YZ$.
$$\text{Area}=\frac{1}{2}(24)(24\tan 41^{\circ})=288\tan 41^{\circ}$$

steps.title: Match the coefficient
steps.content: The area is written in the form $k\tan 41^{\circ}$, so $k=288$. The answer is 288.
